use clap::{Parser, Subcommand};

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, default_value = "config.toml")]
    config: String,

    #[command(subcommand)]
    command: Commands,
}

#[derive(Subcommand)]
enum Commands {
    Lint { path: String },
    Format { path: String },
    Check { path: String },
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    let config = load_config(&cli.config);
    match cli.command {
        Commands::Lint { path } => run_lint(&config, &path),
        Commands::Format { path } => run_format(&config, &path),
        Commands::Check { path } => run_check(&config, &path),
    }
}

fn load_config(_path: &str) -> Config { todo!() }
fn run_lint(_config: &Config, _path: &str) { todo!() }
fn run_format(_config: &Config, _path: &str) { todo!() }
fn run_check(_config: &Config, _path: &str) { todo!() }
struct Config;
